title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama—chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLMs or chat models inside any LangChain pipeline.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight retrieval-augmented-generation starter that pairs Ollama with ChromaDB for private document Q&A.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama’s REST API with syntax highlighting and chat history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement via a VS Code extension.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI (Tauri + React) for chatting with Ollama models offline.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that brings Ollama completions, refactoring, and chat right inside your editor.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host a Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model you run locally.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds a /ollama slash command to query local models privately.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for AI-assisted note writing, summarization, and brainstorming powered by Ollama.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API that exposes Ollama models to web or mobile front-ends with token auth.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that talks to Ollama and supports file upload, code highlighting, and export.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-maintained Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-go
summary: Idiomatic Go client for Ollama with context cancellation and streaming support.

title: ollama-macos-swift
summary: Swift package that wraps Ollama’s API for macOS/iOS apps wishing to run local LLMs.
